data.title: Did American TV Viewers Hear the Devil's Voice on Aug. 29, 1968?
data.author: David Emery
data.claim: "On August 29th, 1968, all the televisions in America were shut down. There was a murmuring on the TV that some believe was the devil's voice. The televisions were off for about 25 seconds. No one knows what the issue was and no one knows what the sound was from the TVs."

data.title: Does This Video Show a 'Jersey Devil' Perched in a Tree?
data.author: Bethania Palma
data.claim: A video shows a real "Jersey Devil" cryptid perched in a tree.

data.title: Did a Power Surge in a Plugged-In Air Fryer Cause a Fire, as Claimed in Viral Facebook Post?
data.author: Jordan Liles
data.claim: A plugged-in air fryer underwent a power surge and caused a kitchen fire, despite the fact that it was plugged in to a special outlet for protection.

data.title: No, This Is Not a 'Human Skin Jacket' from Balenciaga
data.author: David Emery
data.claim: A viral photo emblazoned with fashion house Balenciaga's logo shows a "human skin jacket" made and sold by the company.

data.title: Are Kids 'Snorting' Smarties and Putting Themselves at Risk of Nasal Maggots?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Schoolkids are “snorting” and “smoking” Smarties and putting themselves at risk of contracting nasal maggots.

data.title: Is McDonald's the World's Largest Purchaser of Cow Eyeballs?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: The McDonald’s restaurant chain is the world’s largest purchaser of cow eyeballs.

data.title: A True Story About the Death of a Girl Playing With Leaves?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A father drove his truck over a leaf pile containing his daughter, killing her.

data.title: The ManBeef Hoax
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A website called ManBeef.com authentically advertised real human meat for purchase.

data.title: Are Teens Throwing Lit Gas-Soaked Rags Into Cars?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Teens across the U.S.A. are amusing themselves by throwing lit gasoline-soaked rags into cars halted at stop lights.

data.title: Was a Car Fire Caused by Overheated GPS Battery?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Photographs show the aftermath of a car fire caused by an overheated GPS device.

data.title: Does Using a Recharging Cell Phone Pose a Serious Threat of Electrocution?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Using a cell phone while it is being recharged poses a serious threat of electrocution.

data.title: Does Chocolate Milk Contain Cow's Blood?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Chocolate milk is made from "regular" milk rejected for containing too much cow's blood.

data.title: Can Cellular Calls Cause Brain Hemorrhages?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Cell phone calls from particular phone numbers cause brain hemorrhage and death.

data.title: Was a Finger Found in Wendy's Chili?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A Wendy's customer found a human finger in her bowl of chili.

data.title: Man Burns to Death Rescuing Dog from Hot Springs
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A man was burned to death attempting to rescue his friend's dog from a boiling hot spring.

data.title: Snuff Films
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Films are routinely made for entertainment purposes in which participants are murdered on camera.

data.title: Did the Annabelle Doll Escape from the Warren Museum?
data.author: Dan Evon
data.claim: The Annabelle doll escaped from the Warren's Occult Museum in Connecticut.

data.title: Is the Florida High School Shooter a 'Dreamer'?
data.author: Bethania Palma
data.claim: The accused school shooter in Florida is a Dreamer, a DACA recipient, or undocumented.

data.title: Mass Grave of Dozens of Tortured Black Men Found in Deceased KKK Leader's Estate?
data.author: Brooke Binkowski
data.claim: The bodies of dozens of black men were found on the estate of a former Ku Klux Klan member.

data.title: Are Motorists Finding HIV-Infected Needles on Gas Pump Handles?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Service station customers are getting stuck by HIV-loaded syringes affixed to gas pump handles.

data.title: Tapeworm Diet Pills
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Women used to maintain slender figures by ingesting diet pills made from tapeworms.

data.title: Motorcycle Helmet Self-Sacrifice
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A motorcyclist on bike that has lost its brakes gives his helmet to his girlfriend, saving her life at the cost of his own.

data.title: The Microwaved Baby
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Stoned babysitter cooks an infant in the oven.

data.title: Oleander Poisoning
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A troop of Boy Scouts dies after roasting hot dogs on oleander sticks.

data.title: Did a Beer Flood Kill 9 People?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Nine people died in a beer flood in 1814.

data.title: Texas Lawyer Arrested for Michael Myers 'Halloween' Prank
data.author: Bethania Palma
data.claim: A lawyer in Texas was arrested for a prank in which he dressed up like the killer in the movie "Halloween," Michael Myers, and roamed the beach in Galveston, Texas, ahead of a storm.

data.title: Did Lightning Shock a Teacher's Laptop During Online Class?
data.author: Bethania Palma
data.claim: A woman in Guthrie, Oklahoma, was shocked while using a laptop to teach an online course during a lightning storm.

data.title: Did Woman Die After Trapping Her Head in Car Door at Garage Kiosk?
data.author: Madison Dapcevich
data.claim: A 23-year-old Ohio woman died after her head became trapped between her vehicle door and its frame after colliding with the payment machine in a parking garage.

data.title: Does 'Helltown' Film Document Weird Happenings in Abandoned Ohio Town?
data.author: Dan Evon
data.claim: The film "Helltown" is a genuine documentary about a teenager's mysterious disappearance, a cult, and a military mission gone wrong.

data.title: Did an English Woman Lie Dead at Home Undiscovered for Years?
data.author: Dan MacGuill
data.claim: In 2006, the skeletal remains of Joyce Carol Vincent were found in her home, with the television on, years after her death.

data.title: Was Essie Dunbar Discovered Alive in the Coffin During Her Funeral?
data.author: Alex Kasprak
data.claim: A 30-year-old woman was partially buried during a funeral service in 1915, only to be found alive inside the coffin by her grieving sister.

data.title: Did Police in Delaware Shoot and Kill a Man in a Wheelchair?
data.author: Arturo Garcia
data.claim: Police in Wilmington, Delaware shot and killed a man who was in a wheelchair at the time of the encounter.

data.title: Was a Young Girl Decapitated by a Seat Belt in a Car Crash?
data.author: Dan MacGuill
data.claim: Katie Flynn was decapitated while wearing a seat belt, in a 2005 car crash on Long Island, New York.

data.title: Spanish Woman Cut in Half in Fatal Elevator Accident?
data.author: Arturo Garcia
data.claim: A woman in Sevilla, Spain, was "cut in half" in a fatal elevator accident in a hospital that occurred shortly after she gave birth.

data.title: The Truth About Slenderman
data.author: David Emery
data.claim: There is a faceless, semi-human monster called Slenderman who stands eight feet tall, has tentacles for arms, stalks and eats small children, and communicates telepathically with his human servants, called "proxies."

data.title: Was the Raggedy Ann Doll Modeled After a Child Killed by a Vaccine?
data.author: Kim LaCapria
data.claim: Raggedy Ann dolls were created by a grief-stricken father who lost his daughter to a vaccine-related illness, and who wished to broadcast the risks of vaccination.

data.title: Spider Bursts Out of Overripe Banana?
data.author: Bethania Palma
data.claim: A video captures a large spider that survived inside a banana until it burst out of the peel by its own power.

data.title: Ohio Police Post Graphic Photograph of Adults Passed Out from Heroin with Child in Car
data.author: Bethania Palma
data.claim: A photograph taken by a responding police officer shows a couple passed out in their vehicle from a suspected heroin overdose, with their child in the back seat.

data.title: The Strange Death of Elisa Lam
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A young woman named Elisa Lam disappeared under mysterious circumstances in Los Angeles, her body later found in a hotel's water tank.

data.title: Rat Found in Dr Pepper Bottle
data.author: Kim LaCapria
data.claim: A Texas man found a dead rat in a partially consumed bottle of Dr Pepper.

data.title: Seven People 'Dead by ISIS' in Local Attack
data.author: Kim LaCapria
data.claim: An ISIS attack claimed seven lives in a U.S. town.

data.title: Ecstasy in Halloween Candy?
data.author: Kim LaCapria
data.claim: Parents should keep any eye out for drug-laced Gummy bears and ecstasy (MDMA) disguised as Halloween candy being distributed to trick-or-treaters.

data.title: Nigeria: Restaurant Served Roasted Human Heads
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A hotel restaurant in Nigeria was found to be selling human meat.

data.title: The Disappearance of Ashley, Kansas
data.author: Kim LaCapria
data.claim: The town of Ashley, Kansas, and its entire population disappeared after an earthquake in 1952.

data.title: Dallas Copper Bandits
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A graphic image set illustrates the gruesome fates of two copper thieves in Dallas.

data.title: Baby Killed by Electric Shock from Cord
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Image depicts a toddler who was electrocuted after playing with an electrical cord.

data.title: Is This Photo of an 'Inhuman' Handprint Left on a Window Real?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Photograph shows an unnaturally large handprint left on the window of a missing college student's dorm room.

data.title: Kids Using Burt's Bees on Eyelids to Get High?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Kids are rubbing Burt's Bees lip balm on their eyelids to get high.

data.title: Can 9-Volt Batteries Cause House Fires?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Improperly stored or discarded 9-volt batteries can touch off house fires.

data.title: 1962 Halloween Massacre
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Photograph shows a masked partygoer who killed seven people on Halloween 1962.

data.title: Spider Lives in Man's Scar?

data.claim: A vacationing man discovered that increasing pain he was experiencing was due to a tropical spider's living under his skin.

data.title: Is This a Photograph of a Venomous 'Asp' Caterpillar?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Photographs show a venomous caterpillar known as an asp.

data.title: Did a Teenager Die Attempting the Ice Bucket Challenge?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A teenager died attempting the ALS 'ice bucket challenge.'

data.title: Smoking Bedbugs to Get High
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Schoolkids are smoking and injecting crushed bedbugs to get high from a hallucinogenic substance they contain.

data.title: Razor Blades Found in Playground Equipment
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Razor blades were discovered glued to playground equipment in a public park.

data.title: Did a Family Die After Drinking From a Tea Kettle Poisoned By a Deadly Spider?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A family perished after drinking tea from a kettle in which a deadly spider had died.

data.title: Husband Convicted of Manslaughter After Dutch Oven Goes 'Horribly Wrong'
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A man was convicted of manslaughter for accidentally killing his wife with a "Dutch oven."

data.title: Was the Russian Sleep Experiment Real?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Account describes the horrific results of a "Russian Sleep Experiment" from the late 1940s.

data.title: Burglar Discovers Suicide
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A burglar discovered a suicide in the home he'd broken into.

data.claim: Mysterious black-eyed children show up at the homes of unsuspecting residents.

data.claim: An "expressionless" apparition in a blood-covered gown appeared at Cedars-Sinai hospital in 1972.

data.title: LQP-79 Zombie Virus

data.claim: A virus known as LQP-79 produces "zombie-like" cannibalistic behavior in humans.

data.claim: A razor blade discovered in a child's "footies" (footed pajamas) injured a baby.

data.claim: A child injured his arm through extended wearing of Silly Bandz.

data.claim: An overheated laptop used in a bed caused a fatal house fire.

data.title: Cockroach Eggs in Drinking Straws
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Cockroach eggs in drinking straws pose a general danger to restaurant patrons.

data.claim: Photographs show a golfer whose arm was torn off by an alligator.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Hitchhiker utters prophecy about Judgment Day being upon us, then vanishes.

data.claim: Bram Stoker's novel 'Dracula' features a titular vampire who cannot expose himself to sunlight and is killed with a wooden stake.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A man's cell phone placed calls to his loved ones after his demise.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Electric fans left running overnight kill persons sleeping in the breeze they generate.

data.title: Golf Club Death

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A man was killed by an exploding lava lamp.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A ghostly figure produced by a moth saved a train from traversing a washed-out bridge.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Children's Webkinz are being murdered online.

data.claim: A spectator at a football game was killed by a flying model lawnmower.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: The presence of electronic devices (such as iPods and cell phones) on one's body can make lightning strike injuries more severe.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.title: Henna Tattoo Scarring
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.claim: Internet-circulated list titled "2006 Darwin Awards" details actual deaths.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Man fooled into thinking he has been executed dies of a heart attack.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.title: Have People Died Laughing?

data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: The film The Texas Chainsaw Massacre was based on a true story.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A Houston doctor was decapitated by a malfunctioning elevator.

data.claim: Texas dog has unfortunate encounter with a walkingstick from Belize.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A tourist was electrocuted while crossing a street in Las Vegas.

data.claim: A child died during a routine operation because someone used a cell phone in a hospital.

data.claim: The death of an infant in an automobile accident led to the invention of 'Baby on Board' signs.

data.title: Broom Death
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A coed fatally skewers herself while masturbating with a broom handle.

data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Evian brand drinking water is filtered with cow's blood.

data.title: Child Falls on Knife in Dishwasher
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Child falls on knife in open dishwasher and dies.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.claim: A child drowned after jumping into the ocean to see SpongeBob SquarePants.

data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: The larva of a human botfly was removed from a child's eye.

data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Siblings are coincidentally killed in related automobile accidents.

data.claim: A man locked in an unplugged freezer imagined himself freezing to death and died as a result.

data.claim: Glen Eagles hospital issued an urgent warning because seven women have died after sniffing perfume samples received in the mail.

data.title: Cats Sacrificed at Halloween?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Black cats are routinely sacrificed by "satanic cults" at Halloween.

data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: An attempted abduction of a child from a mall or amusement park was thwarted because the kidnappers forgot to change the child's shoes.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson

data.claim: Customer becomes sick after eating a steak at a chain restaurant; analysis of her meal reveals the presence of human urine in the meat.

data.claim: Drugged travelers awaken in ice-filled bathtubs only to discover one of their kidneys has been harvested by organ thieves.

data.title: Is the Bloody Mary Story True?

data.title: Do People Swallow Eight Spiders Per Year?

data.claim: The average person swallows eight spiders per year.

data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Bubble Yum chewing gum contains spider eggs.

data.title: The Boyfriend's Death
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Hours after sending her boyfriend in search of gasoline, a girl is rescued from her stranded car by police. Though cautioned not to turn around, she does...and sees her boyfriend's lifeless body hanging from a tree branch above the car.

data.title: The Microwaved Workman
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A worker who stood too close to microwave radiation was cooked by its rays.

data.title: Floor Polisher Hospital Deaths
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: An inattentive janitor caused several deaths in a hospital when he disconnected patients' life support systems to plug in a floor polisher.

data.title: Menudo Finger
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A human finger was found in a can of menudo.

data.title: Death of Diane Linkletter
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Thinking she could fly, Diane Linkletter accidentally jumped to her death while high on LSD.

data.title: Granny on the Roof Rack
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: An old woman traveling in a car filled with relatives dies during a long journey. The surviving family members place her corpse on the car's roof rack, cover it with a tarp, and continue on. Upon reaching the nearest town, the family stops for a coffee and something to eat, leaving Granny's remains tied to the roof rack. They return to the parking lot to find their vehicle — and their dead relative — gone.

data.title: HIV Needles in Coin Returns
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Drug users are disposing of their used needles by putting them into the coin return slots of public telephones, thereby infecting unsuspecting victims with hepatitis and HIV.

data.title: Did a Statue Called Black Agnes Kill a Teenage Girl?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A teenage girl who bets her friends she can spend the night in a cemetery is found dead in the arms of a graveyard statue.

data.title: Getting the Strap
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Women who wear their purses strapped across their bodies running the risk of being beheaded by purse snatchers.

data.title: Did a Man Die Demonstrating a Window's Strength?
data.author: Snopes Staff
data.claim: A Toronto lawyer demonstrating the safety of window panes in a skyscraper plunged through a window to his death.

data.title: Poisoned Halloween Candy
data.author: Snopes Staff
data.claim: Police have documented cases of people randomly distributing poisoned goodies to children on Halloween.

data.title: Pins and Needles in Halloween Candy
data.author: Snopes Staff
data.claim: Pins, needles, and razor blades have been found in trick-or-treaters' loot.

data.title: LSD Tattoos
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Rub-on "tattoos" of cartoon characters laced with LSD are handed out to children by unscrupulous drug dealers.

data.title: Beheaded Child on Schoolbus
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A little girl whose habit it was to hang her head out the school bus window was decapitated by a road sign.

data.title: Toilets Boobytrapped by Zero Population Growth Terrorists?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Zero Population Growth terrorists are boobytrapping men's toilers with razors.

data.title: Death by Playing Cards
data.author: Snopes Staff
data.claim: A prisoner killed himself using a deck of playing cards.

data.title: AIDS Mary
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: The morning after a one-night fling, a man walks into his bathroom and finds the words “WELCOME TO THE WORLD OF AIDS” scrawled on the mirror in lipstick.

data.title: The Killer in the Backseat
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A good Samaritan warns a female driver about the armed and dangerous man hiding in the back seat of her car.

data.title: Slavemaster
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A man using the screen name 'Slavemaster' is luring women to their deaths over the Internet.

data.title: DreamWeaverGrey Warning
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A man using the screen name 'DreamWeaverGrey' is luring women to their deaths over the Internet.

data.title: Aren't You Glad You Didn't Turn on the Light?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A female college student returns to her dorm room late one evening and discovers her roommate has been murdered.

data.title: Mutilated Boy
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A gang lures a little boy into a washroom and chops off his penis.

data.title: Severed Fingers
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A motorist who has a run-in with ruffians afterwards finds the severed fingers of his assailants caught on his car.

data.title: Did Pop Rocks and Soda Kill 'Little Mikey'?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Little Mikey of LIFE cereal fame died from the explosive effects of mixing Pop Rocks candy with soda pop.

data.title: Death by Saguaro
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A damaged saguaro cactus fell onto the man who had harmed it and killed him.

data.title: Heroin Needle in the Ballpit
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A little boy dies after being pricked by a heroin-filled syringe in a playground ball pit.

data.title: Did Cher Have Ribs Removed To Make Her Waist Smaller?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Cher had her lowest pair of ribs surgically removed to achieve an ultra-small waist.

data.title: Are Robbers Subduing Victims with Perfume?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: Robbers in shopping mall parking lots are using ether-filled perfume bottles to render their victims unconscious.

data.title: Car Thief Dies in Earthquake
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: After the 1989 Loma Prieta earthquake, a car thief was found crushed to death under a collapsed freeway overpass in the vehicle he'd stolen.

data.title: Was Calvin Coolidge's Son Killed by His Socks?
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: President Calvin Coolidge's son was killed by a poisonous dye in his black socks.

data.title: The Microwaved Pet
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: An elderly pet owner accidentally kills her animal companion by attempting to dry it in a microwave oven.

data.title: Devil in the Dancehall
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Horrified onlookers notice that the enthralling stranger dancing with a pretty girl from the village has cloven hooves.

data.title: Do Dealers Smuggle Drugs in Dead Babies?
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Drug dealers use hollowed-out bodies of dead children to smuggle cocaine into the U.S.

data.title: Urine in Corona Beer
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Workers at the Corona brewery urinate into the beer.

data.title: Mall Abductions
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Women are being lured out of malls and into dangerous situations with the promise of appearing in television commericals.

data.title: Snakes in the Ball Pit
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: Venomous snakes lurk in the ball pits of fast food restaurants.

data.title: Faked Hanging
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A miscreant who attempted to rip off the home of a dead man paid for the crime with his life when the shock of being kicked by the "corpse" was enough to bring on a fatal heart attack.

data.title: Bicycle Pump Death
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A 13-year-old boy in Thailand died from pumping air up his rectum to get high.

data.title: Laundry Machine Death
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A Virginia man was washing machined to death.

data.title: Crocodile Eats Golfer
data.author: David Mikkelson
data.claim: A Palm Beach golfer was devoured by a large crocodile right on the links.

data.title: Menu Shouldn't Trust
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A woman traveling on business almost becomes a crime statistic because she filled out a room service menu.

data.title: Leper in Chesterfield Cigarette Factory
data.author: Barbara Mikkelson
data.claim: A leper was found working in a Chesterfield cigarette factory.
